message:
test(wave-49): pure data-type coverage for oracle, scheduler, timeout

Add 9 tests exercising Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/PartialEq/Eq derives:
- lab/oracle/loser_drain: LoserDrainViolation, LoserDrainOracle
- lab/oracle/region_tree: RegionTreeViolation (6 variants), RegionTreeOracle
- runtime/scheduler/global_injector: PriorityTask, TimedTask
- service/timeout: TimeoutLayer, Timeout accessors, TimeoutError

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
